data.name: Perovskite-Silicon Tandem Cell
data.description: Stacking a perovskite top cell (wide bandgap) on a silicon bottom cell captures more of the solar spectrum. This is the fastest path to exceeding the silicon single-junction limit (29.4%).
data.developer: Oxford PV, LONGi, Hanwha Qcells, CubicPV
data.status: Oxford PV shipping first commercial tandem modules (2024); mass production 2025-2026

data.name: All-Perovskite Tandem Cell
data.description: Two perovskite layers with different bandgaps stacked together. Potentially cheaper than perovskite-silicon tandems since both layers are solution-processable. Key challenge: stable narrow-bandgap perovskite (tin-lead).
data.status: Lab efficiency records climbing rapidly; stability improving; commercialization 5+ years

data.name: HJT (Heterojunction Technology)
data.efficiency: 26.81% (LONGi, world record for silicon single junction)
data.description: Combines crystalline silicon with amorphous silicon layers for high efficiency and low temperature coefficient. Better performance in hot climates than PERC.
data.status: Commercial; growing market share; LONGi's 26.81% broke the silicon efficiency record

data.name: TOPCon (Tunnel Oxide Passivated Contact)
data.description: The current mainstream upgrade from PERC, adding a tunnel oxide layer for better surface passivation. Dominating new capacity additions globally.
data.developer: Jinko Solar, Trina, JA Solar, LONGi
data.status: Mainstream; >60% of new capacity in 2024; lowest $/W in mass production

data.name: CIGS Thin Film
data.description: Copper indium gallium selenide thin-film solar cells. Flexible, lightweight, and good performance in low-light and high-temperature conditions. Used in BIPV and portable applications.
data.developer: Solar Frontier, Avancis, Manz AG, Flisom
data.status: Niche market; flexible and BIPV applications; indium supply concern

data.name: Organic Photovoltaics (OPV)
data.description: Carbon-based semiconductors enabling ultra-lightweight, flexible, semi-transparent solar cells. Can be printed on plastic films. Very low cost potential but limited efficiency and stability.
data.status: Niche applications (BIPV, IoT power); efficiency gap too large for mainstream

data.name: Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) with Thermal Storage
data.description: Mirrors concentrate sunlight to heat molten salt, which stores energy for 10+ hours of dispatchable power. Provides baseload solar without batteries.
data.status: Operational plants in Morocco, UAE, China, Spain; declining costs but still expensive vs PV+battery

data.name: Bifacial Solar Modules
data.efficiency: 5-25% more energy than monofacial depending on albedo
data.description: Modules that capture light from both sides, using ground-reflected light to boost output. Now standard for utility-scale installations.
